name: Gentlemen Group GmbH
message: Gentlemen Group GmbH (founded on January 1, 2021) provides services management, enterprise services (ESM) and management of identification and access (IAM), and technological consultations with an emphasis on strategy, organization, IT, as well as the implementation of decisions and training. Gentlemen Group GmbH corporate office is located in Starnberger Str. 8, 14612 Falkensee, Germany. The total amount of data leakage is 218.4 GB
